notes: Triaged all 53 unique unhinted TypeScript drift refs from ts-accuracy-drift.json. Classification: EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT=1 (FeedRepository.getCommunityFeed exists in source but regex extractor missed it); GENUINE_DRIFT=19 (symbol existed under an old name—renames documented with proposed successors, e.g. RoomRepository.getBroadcastData→getBroadcasterData, PostRepository.updatePost→editPost, ChannelRepository.leave→leaveChannel, notificationTray.markSeen→markTraySeen, etc.); DOC_FABRICATION=31 (mostly Amity-prefixed type names copied from iOS/Android docs into TS code blocks, plus non-existent methods like AdRepository.markAdSeen, Client.onNotification, EventRepository.rsvpEvent); FALSE_POSITIVE=2 (Jest mockResolvedValue/mockRejectedValue methods matched as SDK refs).
